info.name: AI Service API
info.description: Generated from OpenAPI, keeping request bodies.

request.description:
Health check endpoint.
Returns service status, version, and dependency connectivity.
Root endpoint.
Process email title/content and return one of 4 supported labels.
Test endpoint: process one RabbitMQ 'ingested' payload directly.

Process a user question with Corpus Tree RAG traversal and return a complete answer. FAQ retrieval/answering runs only when traversal returns FAQ candidates; the response timeline otherwise proceeds to file retrieval and document reads.

body.raw:
{
  "question": "Điều kiện tốt nghiệp của trường là gì?",
  "sessionId": "{{session_id}}",
  "resolveCitations": false,
  "citationLinkType": "markdown",
  "toRichText": false
}

request.description: Stream chat response with RAG using SSE. Corpus traversal activities are emitted in realtime as corpus_traversal steps; final steps use query_analysis, corpus_traversal, faq_retrieval, faq_answer, file_retrieval, and document_read.

item.name: List chat sessions by current user
List messages in a chat session
Delete a chat session and its messages

request.description: Return total topic count, root count, and direct file/FAQ link counts.

Return nested Corpus Topic Tree. directFiles/directFaqs contain typed {id,name,metadata,lecturerOnly,updatedAt}. Optional metadataFilter is a JSON string using the same shape as FAQ/File filters, e.g. {academicYear:{fromYear:0,toYear:9999},enrollmentYear:{fromYear:2024}}; lecturerOnly=true/false filters exact visibility and omitted means all. Filtered empty branches are hidden and counts are recomputed; raw/subtree ID arrays and derivable tree fields are omitted.
List all Corpus topics with file/FAQ counts.
Get full details for a Corpus topic, including direct/subtree file and FAQ ids.
Return the direct Corpus topic assignments for one file.
Replace all direct Corpus topic assignments for one file. An empty nodeKeys array unlinks it from every topic.
Return the direct Corpus topic assignments for one FAQ.
Replace all direct Corpus topic assignments for one FAQ. An empty nodeKeys array unlinks it from every topic.
Manually create a Corpus topic.
Update a Corpus topic title, summary, or parentKey.
Move source topic links/children into target topic and delete source.
Delete a Corpus topic.
Start background backfill without seeding. It reindexes READY files and non-deleted FAQs; when the catalog is empty, CorpusLinker may let the LLM propose and create new root topics.

Run Corpus Tree traversal for a question and return typed candidates plus traversal trace: status, selectedTopics, expandedNodeKeys, inspectedNodeKeys, terminationReason, turnCount, and tokenUsage. Use metadataFilter for metadata constraints; duplicate traversalNodeKeys and candidate totals are omitted.

Dry-run the shared RagQueryPipeline.answer_chat flow without a real JWT. Response is flattened and includes analysis, answer, source, candidates, FAQs, citations, steps, tokenUsage and maxTurnsReached.
Upload a document file to R2.

List files with optional fileStatus, metadataFilter, lecturerOnly, keywords, page, and limit filters. List items omit tableOfContents and are loaded through a compact Mongo projection; request file detail or TOC Tree when needed. Admin/lecture may filter lecturerOnly exactly; student cannot opt into lecturer-only files.
Upload multiple files at once, each with its own display name and metadata.
Soft-delete the file and retain R2/TOC artifacts for restore.
List soft-deleted files with the same filters as the active list, including lecturerOnly. List items omit tableOfContents. Admin only.
Restore a soft-deleted file and its Corpus assignments.
Permanently purge a file that is already in trash.
Download the original uploaded file or its markdown version.
Returns the fixed metadata schema definition — document types and sentinel values — so the frontend can render the file-upload / FAQ-import forms correctly.
Parse an uploaded PDF using LlamaParse and return normalized markdown pages.

item.name: Get Table of Contents for a file

request.description: Retrieve the hierarchical Table of Contents (TOC) structure for a given file_id.
List FAQs with optional filtering.
Create a new FAQ manually.
Debug endpoint to test FAQ-based answering.
List FAQ candidates from synthesis.
Get a specific FAQ candidate by ID.
Approve or reject an FAQ candidate.

body.raw:
{
  "action": "approve",
  "questionOverride": null,
  "answerRichTextOverride": null,
  "metadataFilterOverride": null,
  "note": "Câu trả lời chính xác"
}

request.description: FAQ synthesis endpoint is currently disabled and returns 501 pending architecture migration.
Update an existing FAQ.
Soft-delete an FAQ and remove it from Corpus.
List soft-deleted FAQs. Admin only.
Restore a soft-deleted FAQ and its Corpus assignments.
Permanently purge an FAQ that is already in trash.
Get a specific FAQ by ID.
Upload Excel and preview extracted FAQ rows.
Upload Excel and create FAQs in bulk.
Bulk create FAQs from JSON data.

variable.description: JWT access token from nest-api (POST /auth/login or GET /auth/google). Required for Store, File, and Metadata write endpoints.
MongoDB ObjectId of file (fill after uploading a file)
